package rulecoverage

func PositiveTempFilePredictableName() string {
    ruleID := "temp_file_predictable_name"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`os.Create(\"/tmp/myapp-data.txt\")` or `os.OpenFile(\"/tmp/\" + fixedName, ...)` with predictable filenames"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
